title: agropyron troctolepis
intro: Agropyron troctolepis, also known as the crested wheatgrass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron troctolepis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Agropyron troctolepis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
